title: Does Yosys 0.45 does not support assume or assert types?

features.name: sva_assume_property_directive
features.description: Code should include an SVA assume property directive used for formal constraint specification
features.snippet: assume property (@(posedge clk) disable iff (!resetn) req |-> ack);

features.name: sva_assert_property_directive
features.description: Code should include an SVA assert property directive for formal verification checking
features.snippet: assert property (@(posedge clk) disable iff (!resetn) valid_idx |-> !stall);
